root.Grants: haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|ALTER|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|ALTER ROUTINE|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|CREATE|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|CREATE ROUTINE|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|CREATE TEMPORARY TABLES|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|CREATE VIEW|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|DELETE|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|DROP|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|EVENT|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|EXECUTE|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|INDEX|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|INSERT|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|LOCK TABLES|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|REFERENCES|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|SELECT|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|SHOW VIEW|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|TRIGGER|G haf_messenger|schema||haf_app|localhost|UPDATE|G

column.name: sha256_hash_hex
column.Comment: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the plaintext file

column.name: SQL_DATA_ACCESS
column.StoredType: enum('CONTAINS SQL', 'NO SQL', 'READS SQL DATA', 'MODIFIES SQL DATA')|0e
